title: Spy on Throne Strategy
content: Use Spy on Throne before attacks to gather province information including land, networth, resources, military, and available defenses. Essential for target evaluation.

title: Spy on Military Strategy
content: Use Spy on Military to determine enemy troop composition and estimate offensive and defensive strength before planning attacks.

title: Survey Strategy
content: Use Survey to discover building distribution and efficiency. Helps identify targets with weak infrastructure or vulnerable setups.

title: Nightstrike Strategy
content: Use Nightstrike to remove enemy offensive units before coordinated attacks. Most effective against provinces relying on offense for their role.

title: Assassinate Wizards Strategy
content: Use Assassinate Wizards to reduce enemy magical power and weaken their ability to cast important spells.

title: Kidnap Strategy
content: Use Kidnap to reduce enemy population and weaken province economy, military capacity, and recovery.

title: Rob the Vaults Strategy
content: Use Rob the Vaults to steal enemy gold and damage their economy.

title: Propaganda Strategy
content: Use Propaganda to reduce enemy honor and weaken provinces that rely on honor bonuses.

title: Pre Wave Intel
content: Before a coordinated wave, gather updated intel with Spy on Throne, Spy on Military, and Survey to choose targets and avoid surprises.
